rationale: Faithful Task 4a AS-IS within frozen v15 (AM-40/AM-41) scope. inventory.mjs commits exact sorted PACKAGE_ROOTS (five spine packages) + explicit PACKAGE_ROOTS_EXCLUDE (three siblings) with tracked package.json completeness unit (discovered == union ∧ disjoint); DOC_ROOTS, DOC_WEAVER_EXCLUDE, GLOBAL_EXCLUDE, sorted CONTRACT_FILES (D31), LEDGER_SOURCES=[], RUN_SOURCES, five weaver ids+integer versions, REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS deep-equal to the frozen normative table with equality unit, LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS deep-frozen with exact {module,node:module}→[builtinModules,isBuiltin] and freeze/mutation units, and WEAVER_IMPL_FILES only for git+code (D17/AM-17) naming existing files. util.mjs exports the ONE shared D33 classifier+resolver (AM-34 test 19 proved: sole defs, code imports them, deriveAcceptedClosure body calls both), AM-41 closed profile fail-closed (b1–b6 + leading shebang + original-uncollapsed symlink-before-.. containment), Phase-1 export scanner, real-file walker (root-escape/symlink reject), D26/D29 counted-iterator (count only on completed consumption; driver-held accessor only), D21 physicalContainment (lstat every component, never follow), and no-shell git allowlist of exact subcommand/arg shapes. test-closure derives closures with the shared machinery and proves committed inventories equal derived closures (form-only fixtures for every accepted load form incl. require/module.require/.cjs, recursion/cycles/unreachable-literal-dynamic, permitted merkle-dag traversal, missing/extra/nonexistent inventory, unresolved/ambiguous/symlink/escape/forbidden/non-regular, non-literal/comment/string no-edge). git.mjs uses exactly `log -S<symbol> --format=%H --reverse -- <path>` and `log --format=%H --reverse -- <path>`, first result → git:<sha>, malformed fatal, empty warns. code.mjs emits all four depends-on endpoint shapes with symbol/file threading, unrepresentable-consumer only for unresolvable/out-of-roots, unused/comment/string no edge, dedup. Zero runtime deps; ESM; node:/clotho-relative only; spine untouched; 4b/5 items (orchestrator inventory, D34 re-derive, test/doc/ledger weavers, publication) absent. Gate finalStatus=meets. No faithfulness or scope defects warranting revise/reject.
